title: SecureLib
description: Security blocks library and standalone mod to protect your base
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56dd6d544d8d34eb29b0dc2d60a575af887807bd.png)

Standalone security mod and freqency/clearance API

## For devs, please go to the [devs wiki](https://github.com/RubiiW/SecureLib-NeoForge-1.21.1/wiki/Devs)

## For players, you can see how the mod works (as well as recipes and tags) on the [players wiki](https://github.com/RubiiW/SecureLib-NeoForge-1.21.1/wiki/Players)

## For Modpack makers, you can use the mod if you give proper credits

## FEATURES:
- **Keycard (Customizable)**
- **Tricard (Customizable)**
- **Operator Keycard (Admin Skeleton Keycard)**
- **Card Reader**
- **Keypad**
- **Keypad Reader (Combination of both)**
- **(Tri)Card Writer & Printer**
- **(Tri-)Reader Editor**
